topics.title: AOL Unsexy Men List and Fab Foe
topics.summary: The studio discusses a list of unsexy men published by AOL, the decline of AOL's subscriber base, and listener feedback regarding a recent broadcast featuring the Beatles tribute band, Fab Foe.

topics.title: Fast Food Chains and Pop Culture
topics.summary: The studio discusses the evolution of live music technology, a comedic segment featuring "Grandma Caprio," the quality of various fast-food pizza chains, and an appearance by Dog the Bounty Hunter on Larry King.

topics.title: Celebrity Divorce Settlements and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the high costs of celebrity divorces, specifically Michael Jordan's settlement, while also debating film production plans and potential television appearances.

topics.title: Divorce Settlements and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal complexities of high-profile divorce settlements, a car accident involving Nick Hogan, and upcoming media features for Artie Lange.

topics.title: Frank Caliendo Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts comedian Frank Caliendo to discuss his career as an impressionist, his work on Mad TV and NFL broadcasts, and his various celebrity impersonations.

topics.title: Frank Caliendo's Impressions and Television Career
topics.summary: The studio features Frank Caliendo discussing his career on Mad TV, his upcoming television show, the nuances of perfecting celebrity impressions like Charles Barkley and Jack Nicholson, and his experiences performing in heavy makeup.

topics.title: Frank Caliendo's Impressions and Comedy Career
topics.summary: The show features Frank Caliendo discussing his experience with impressions on Mad TV, the pressures of sketch comedy writing, and a comedic segment involving Gary Garver at the O.J. Simpson trial.

topics.title: O.J. Simpson Trial and Sirius-XM Merger
topics.summary: The studio discusses a reporter's encounter with O.J. Simpson, the presence of 'trial groupies' at his court case, and the regulatory hurdles facing the Sirius-XM merger.

topics.title: Television Writers Strike and Industry Shifts
topics.summary: The studio discusses the nuances of television writing, the impact of digital streaming on traditional media, and the implications of the ongoing writers' strike for Hollywood production.

topics.title: Race Relations and Show News
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from personal views on race and the use of racial slurs in media to upcoming news segments and guest appearances.

topics.title: Music, Celebrity News, and Body Image
topics.summary: The studio explores various topics including the Beatles' discography, controversial music from the "Racist Redneck Rebels" album, reports on Donda West’s death, and a discussion regarding scientific theories on hip-to-waist ratios and intelligence.

topics.title: Legal Troubles and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio covers various topics including a listener's vandalism charges, the legal issues facing former police commissioner Bernard Carrick, Marvel's move to online comics, Lindsay Lohan's community service, and a bizarre report of a man marrying a dog in India.

topics.title: Cultural News and Entertainment Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a diverse range of topics including rural Indian traditions, television ratings for reality shows, legal rulings on firearms in schools, celebrity news regarding the writers' strike, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
